packageName: Atlas Executive OS Mission 002 Demonstration Factory Package

architecture.mission: Produce executive-quality demonstration websites before sale requests to maximize probability of Customer #1.
architecture.objectivePriority: Qualified leads and booked jobs over visual novelty.

projectTypes.purpose: Public capability proof using fictional businesses.
requiredComponents: Design decision rationale with research references

projectTypes.disclosureStatement: Prepared by Atlas as a demonstration of our recommended improvements.

workflow.objective: Confirm demonstration type and business outcome target.
workflow.output: Mission brief with demonstration type classification

workflow.objective: Define conversion scope and measurable KPI assumptions.
Collect evidence and baseline website performance signals.
workflow.output: Research reference sheet and baseline findings

workflow.objective: Map design changes directly to lead and booking outcomes.
workflow.output: Conversion blueprint with CTA and trust architecture
Demonstration homepage, landing page, and mobile variant

workflow.objective: Quantify expected impact and assign confidence levels.
workflow.output: Executive audit and business impact report

workflow.objective: Assemble audit, comparison, references, and decision narrative.
Prepare approved package for optional future sales use.
workflow.output: Sales Engine handoff package (no outreach executed)

requiredSpecialists.responsibility: Evidence collection for local SEO, conversion patterns, and industry benchmarks.
Translate findings into CTA flows and trust architecture tied to lead outcomes.
Create coherent visual system that supports scanning, trust, and action.
Build homepage, landing page, and mobile variants for demonstration assets.
Design local SEO structure and on-page intent alignment.
Produce conversion weakness diagnosis and recommendation confidence model.
Estimate lead and booking impact ranges with confidence bands.
Assemble final package and enforce disclosure/compliance controls.

executiveReviewProcess.reviewQuestion: Does each major recommendation connect to qualified leads or booked jobs?
executiveReviewProcess.passCriteria: Every recommendation has measurable outcome linkage and KPI hypothesis.

executiveReviewProcess.reviewQuestion: Are recommendations supported by research or accepted conversion best practices?
executiveReviewProcess.passCriteria: All major recommendations include citation or explicit best-practice rationale.

executiveReviewProcess.reviewQuestion: Is the demonstration clearly disclosed as Atlas-generated recommendation work?
executiveReviewProcess.passCriteria: Prospect package contains required disclosure statement verbatim.

executiveReviewProcess.reviewQuestion: Is the package complete for CEO decision and optional Sales Engine handoff?
executiveReviewProcess.passCriteria: All required artifacts present; no outreach, publishing, or contact actions taken.

mappedSalesEngineStages.handoffValue: Accelerates prospect understanding of conversion opportunities.
Provides personalized proof asset after CEO authorization.
Anchors consultative discussion with visual and business impact evidence.
Supports pricing confidence and expected ROI discussion.

restrictions: No outreach executed by Demonstration Factory.
No publishing executed by Demonstration Factory.
No direct prospect contact executed by Demonstration Factory.

controls.governancePolicy: Demonstration assets are sales-enablement proofs, not represented as client delivery history.
controls.mandatoryDisclaimer: Prepared by Atlas as a demonstration of our recommended improvements.
